selectivity_cascade._note: 400A MCCB Type D upstream / 100A MCCB downstream — 4:1 ratio exceeds BS EN 60947-2 typical selectivity threshold.
Same as F01 — 4:1 ratio. L2 is 45m route (longest).

spd_assessment.location_basis: urban commercial with moderate lightning risk; Type 2 default per BS 7671 Reg 443

assumptions: Diversity factor 0.85 applied to per-floor demands (commercial spec office; BCO + IET Wiring Matters guidance).
Imax computed as 86 kVA peak ÷ (√3 × 400V × 0.85) = ~146A — derived inline; deterministic refinement deferred per WI3 to calc.sld_system_metrics.
Selectivity verified by IEC 60898 typical ratio (4:1); manufacturer table consultation recommended for tight design margins.
Emergency lighting via local battery-pack luminaires per BS 5266 (not central inverter); no dedicated emergency-lighting feeder at MSB level.
Fire alarm system on local battery-backed FCU (not integrated into LV distribution at this scale).

Multi-skill intent consumption (v1.4): earthing intent at electrical/earthing/examples/uk-commercial-3storey/intent-out.json provides system_type=TN-C-S, ze_declared_ohm=0.35, supply_bond_type=tn_c_s_pen — cross-checked against SLD supply_origin per INV-11.

Multi-skill intent consumption (v1.4): fault-level intent at electrical/fault-level/examples/uk-commercial-3storey/intent-out.json provides system peak PFC 9.85 kA at transformer secondary per IEC 60909-0:2016 cascade — SLD system_metrics.peak_pfc_ka=9.8 sourced from this value (within ±0.5 kA INV-11 tolerance).
tool_call_pending_for_system_metrics: true — imax_total, SPD assessment, life-safety isolation remain LLM-estimated until calc.sld_system_metrics ships (WI3 deferral preserved).

drawing_notes: MSB-MAIN located in ground-floor plant room with 400A TPN intake from UK DNO TN-C-S supply.
3 feeders (F01/F02/F03) to per-floor sub-DBs at 100A MCCB Type D each.
Type 2 SPD assembly at MSB intake per BS 7671 Reg 443.
Final-circuit RCDs (30mA) located at sub-DBs (preserves MSB-level selectivity).
flags: TOOL-CALL-PENDING:sld_system_metrics — System metrics are LLM-estimates; deterministic refinement deferred per WI3.

rationale.chat_summary: UK 3-storey commercial office (1200m²) on DNO TN-C-S 400V TPN supply (Ze=0.35Ω, PFC=9.8kA). 400A MSB feeds 3 per-floor sub-DBs at 100A each. Total Imax ~146A with diversity 0.85. Type 2 SPD per BS 7671 Reg 443. 4-board cascade verified selective; final-circuit RCDs at sub-DBs. Reply to refine, e.g. 'add UPS for IT loads'.

sections.title: Supply Origin
sections.summary: TN-C-S 400V TPN, declared Ze=0.35Ω + PFC=9.8kA. 400A MCCB main switch with 36kA Icu (BS EN 60947-2).

decisions.label: UK DNO TN-C-S confirmed
decisions.summary: Underground TN-C-S supply with PME bond at service head.

sections.title: Distribution Hierarchy
sections.summary: 4-board radial cascade. MSB-MAIN feeds SDB-GF (F01, 15m), SDB-L1 (F02, 30m), SDB-L2 (F03, 45m). Spec office topology typical for UK 3-storey.

decisions.label: Single MSB + per-floor sub-DB
decisions.summary: Standard UK commercial topology; preserves selectivity and simplifies tenant fit-out.

sections.title: System Metrics
sections.summary: Imax_total 146A (vs 400A main = 36% utilisation, 63% headroom). Peak PFC 9.5kA (vs 36kA Icu — comfortable). Headroom appropriate for tenant fit-out variation.

sections.title: Cascade Selectivity
sections.summary: All 3 parent→child links verified selective: 400A MCCB Type D upstream / 100A MCCB downstream gives 4:1 ratio (exceeds BS EN 60947-2 typical selectivity threshold).

decisions.label: 4:1 selectivity verified
decisions.summary: 400A/100A ratio exceeds 3:1 BS EN 60947-2 typical; verification_method 'iec_60898_typical'.

sections.title: SPD Assessment
sections.summary: Type 2 SPD required at MSB intake per BS 7671 Reg 443. Urban commercial location with moderate lightning risk.

decisions.label: Type 2 SPD at MSB
decisions.summary: BS 7671 Reg 443 baseline for indoor commercial.

sections.title: Life-Safety Isolation
sections.summary: No dedicated fire-alarm / emergency-lighting / UPS distribution at this scale. Emergency lighting via local battery-pack luminaires (BS 5266). Fire alarm system on local battery-backed FCU.

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant. No non-compliance flags. 5 assumptions documented (diversity factor, Imax derivation, selectivity verification method, emergency lighting strategy, fire alarm strategy).

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: 5 assumptions captured in compliance_summary covering diversity factor, Imax derivation, selectivity method, emergency lighting via local battery packs, fire alarm via local battery FCU.
